nasb.text: Then the Levitical priests arose and blessed the people; and their voice was heard and their prayer came to His holy dwelling place, to heaven.

esv.text: Then the priests and the Levites arose and blessed the people, and their voice was heard, and their prayer came to his holy habitation in heaven.

cnv.text: 那時，利未支派的祭司起來，給人民祝福；他們的聲音蒙了垂聽，他們的禱告達到天上　神的聖所那裡。

ccb.text: 利未祭司起来为民众祝福，他们的祷告得蒙垂听，达到天上的圣所。
